name: Franciele
description: Great character voice.

name: Marianne - Customer service
description: A young, professional Brazilian Portuguese female voice designed for customer service agents. Versatile enough for support, sales, collections, and virtual assistants—delivering an empathetic, assertive, and natural tone.

name: Monica
description:
Female voice with an accent.
.

name: Marilita - Natural & Conversacional
description: Conversational female Voice.

name: Gabi - Calm & Friendly
description: A calm, warm, and natural male voice with a relaxed and trustworthy tone. Clear articulation, steady pacing, and smooth delivery make it ideal for long-form listening. Professional yet approachable, conversational without sounding casual, and confident without being authoritative. Avoid exaggerated emotions, dramatic inflections, or recognizable AI-style patterns. Perfect for news, technology, business, educational, and informational content.

name: Flavia
description: A female Brazilian voice, aged 30 to 40, for your creative assets.

name: Maria
description: A mature, elegant, and confident female voice—that of a CEO specializing in credit, collections, public speaking, and agribusiness. The tone is welcoming, professional, and inspiring, conveying authority, clear communication, and a natural pace. Ideal for classes, corporate videos, Social media content, mentorship sessions, and presentations.

name: Thayane - Northern Brazilian accent
description: Great conversational female voice.

name: Rivs
description: A feminine voice with a subtle husky texture.

name: Juliana Gheno
description: A calm, deep voice with a natural gift for storytelling and an engaging, extroverted presence. Warm, confident, and expressive, it draws listeners in while delivering narratives with clarity and authenticity.

name: Alina - Warm & Friendly
description: Warm and friendly - Authentic, smooth, Brazilian Portuguese female voice, perfect for teaching, e-learning, and information sharing. Warm, friendly, and engaging tone.

name: Larry Da-Silva
description: Crystal-clear Brazilian young female voice, deep, and relaxed tone, blending smooth feminine warmth with a subtle masculine edge. Naturally chill and effortless, with fluid pacing, rich vocal texture, and strong clarity. Perfect for content creation, narration, social media videos, podcasts, and modern digital storytelling, delivering a unique, immersive, and captivating listening experience.

name: Marianne - Customer service
description: A young, professional female voice in Brazilian Portuguese, designed for customer service agents. Versatile for support, sales, collections, and virtual assistants—featuring an empathetic, assertive, and natural tone.

name: Nina M.
description: A young, refined, and sweet female voice, with a warm, clear timbre and a gentle, confident intonation.

name: Giselli
description: A calm, clear voice for narration.

name: Bianca Pagliarin - Meditation
description: Female voice, soft and soothing, with a calm and steady tone, facilitating immersion in the meditative practice. This vocal approach is characteristic of the guided meditations by Bianca Pagliarin, who aims to provide an experience of peace and inner alignment with God.

name: Malu - Casual Explainer
description: Tutorials, lessons, recipes — you name it! A clear voice made to explain things in a simple, casual way. Natural and easy to follow, it is perfect for step-by-step guides, educational content, cooking videos, and social media. If you need a friendly and engaging voice that doesn't sound formal, Malu is for you.

name: Luna
description: A soft, calm, and soothing female voice with a gentle tone. Slow-paced, warm, and comforting, perfect for sleep stories, relaxation, and bedtime narration

name: Luciane
description: Conversational female voice.

name: Carolina - Lively and Captivating
description: A vibrant, young Brazilian female voice with a naturally engaging presence. She has a warm, melodic tone brimming with energy and charm, delivering every word with infectious enthusiasm and a conversational ease that's perfect for social media content, brand storytelling, or lifestyle podcasts.
